column1: # Freedman 2019 CCHP VIII Table 3 — TRGB Calibrator Distances (FULL)
# columnar data including per-SN calibrator peak magnitudes in BOTH the
#   mu_TRGB      TRGB distance modulus (mag); empty if not TRGB-measured
#   sigma_T      1σ on mu_TRGB; empty if absent
#   trgb_source  "CCHP" or "JL" (Jang & Lee 2017); empty if absent
#   m_B_CSP      CSP-I standardized peak B-band magnitude (mag)
#   mu_Ceph      Cepheid distance modulus (Riess 2016 Table 5); empty if absent
#   m_B_SuperCal SuperCal system standardized peak m_B (mag); empty if absent
#   host_canon   canonical host name used across the pipeline
